title: Climate Modelling

prerequisites.text: EGS4023F and EGS3012S or equivalent; OR at the discretion of the HoD.

outline: The course provides an introduction to the fundamental elements of climate models and to the application of operational climate models and climate impact models to real-world questions, with applications focussed on the southern African context. Classes are held in the EGS computer lab, primarily using Python on Linux. Basic climate models — energy balance and advection-diffusion models — are developed from conceptual models to numerical implementation run on desktops.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
